docs.title: About
docs.text: welcome to

docs.title: tokaua's hideout
docs.text:
This is a wiki that contains a collection of useful websites, tools, and other media!

Tip

It's essential to have some sort of Adblock when surfing the internet, otherwise you risk getting malicious popups or ads.

Warning

The contents of this site are checked to be safe at the time of uploading, however please verify yourself that what you are downloading is the legitimate resource and has not been tampered with in any way, always be vigilant.

If a resource has been infected with malware, please let me know ASAP!

Want to contribute? visit contributing!

docs.title: Contributing
docs.text:
If you want to contribute, please read this thoroughly!

First, you must fork the repository, which you can do so by clicking here, or the "Fork" button at the top-right corner of the main repository page.

Once you have created the fork, I recommend using git in order to clone your repository.

Before you make any changes, please read the requirements in order to make sure you changes will be accepted!

After you've made your changes, remember to push them to GitHub!

Now, create a pull request here, and check the boxes and fill in any placeholders.

Finally, wait for your contributions to be merged and make sure you haven't been asked to make any changes!

docs.title: Requirements
docs.text:
1. Check to see if the resource you are adding is already listed, we don't want any duplicates, alternatives are OK!

  2. When adding something to a page, please follow this format. 

    [NAME](https://link-to-tool)<br>
description of thing

  3. If the resource you are adding doesn't have any FREE or open-source options, you must add to indicate that it is paid only. 

    :paid: [NAME](https://link-to-tool) (1)<br>
description of thing
{ .annotate }

1.  Pricing: $9.99<br><br>
    Payment Methods:<br>
    Credit Card, PayPal, Google Pay

  4. If the resource you add is software, and doesn't have source code available, please make sure what you are adding is safe, run it through VirusTotal at the bare minimum, or do your own analysis.

  5. Add yourself to the contributors list in credits :]

docs.text:

Hey guys, did you know that in terms of male human and female Pokémon breeding,
Vaporeon is the most compatible Pokémon for humans? Not only are they in the field egg group,
which is mostly comprised of mammals, Vaporeon are an average of 3”03’ tall and 63.9 pounds,
this means they’re large enough to be able handle human dicks, and with their impressive Base
Stats for HP and access to Acid Armor, you can be rough with one. Due to their mostly water based

docs.title: Fortnite
docs.text:
FortniteEndpointsDocumentation Unofficial API Documentation for official Fortnite & Epic Games services.

Project Reboot 3.0 Project Reboot is an open source game server for Fortnite, featuring support for versions between Season 3 and Season 15, and partial support for other versions.

Erbium Erbium is an open source WIP universal game server for Fortnite, featuring support for versions 3.40 to 19.40, with partial support for Chapter 3+ seasons.

Nova Nova was the core game server for Project Nova, a Fortnite private server developed between 2022 and 2025.

Nova Matchmaker The matchmaker for Project Nova, a Fortnite private server developed between 2022 and 2025.

Nova Client The client DLL for Project Nova, a Fortnite private server developed between 2022 and 2025.

Reboot Launcher Reboot Launcher is a GUI and CLI Launcher made for the Reboot Project, but can be used with any valid client and server DLLs.

LawinServerV1 LawinServer is a local singleplayer lobby server emulator for Fortnite, supporting Battle Royale and Save the World.

LawinServerV2 LawinServer V2 is a Fortnite backend written in Node.js that features an account system and XMPP for certain seasons. Only supports Battle Royale.

Cobalt Cobalt is a Universal SSL Bypass for Fortnite.

Tellurium Tellurium is a universal redirect/SSL bypass for native UE HTTP games. Originally designed for Fortnite.

Sinum Sinum is used to redirect requests from a target URL, such as ol.epicgames.com, to another server, like api.novafn.dev. Supports Android, iOS, Windows, and Xbox.

    2. Featured Badge
    3. Paste in Console

var access_token =  $J("[data-loyaltystore]").data("loyaltystore").webapi_token;
var badgeid = 0;

SetFavoriteFeaturedBadge(access_token, badgeid);

function SetFavoriteFeaturedBadge(access_token, badgeid) {
    $J.post( 'https://api.steampowered.com/IPlayerService/SetFavoriteBadge/v1?', {
        access_token: access_token,
        badgeid: badgeid
    });
}

docs.title: Ad Blocking
docs.text:
An adblock is a piece of software that blocks adveristments and intrusive elements.

uBlock Origin (1) More than just an Ad blocker, blocks trackers, coin miners, popups, annoying anti-blockers, malware sites, etc.

  1. uBlockOrigin & uBlacklist Huge AI Blocklist A huge blocklist of manually curated sites (1000+) that contain AI generated content, for the purposes of cleaning image search engines.

    IP-Logger Filter Filter any site/subsite who's only purpose is to log your IP.

    Multi-Purpose Blocklist Prevents your devices from connecting to unwanted or harmful domains.

    Filterlists Collection of blocklists

uBlacklist Blocks specific sites from appearing in Google search results.

SponsorBlock Allows you to skip annoying self-promos, non-music segments on music videos, intros, and much more on YouTube.

docs.title: VPNs
docs.text:
A VPN (virtual private network), creates a tunnel between your device and a server over the internet in order to hide your IP address and gain unrestricted access to global content, block annoying ads, and encrypt your traffic.

Mullvad VPN (1) Cryptocurrencies are discounted at 10% due to lower fees, can use an account on up to 5 devices, does not support port forwarding.

  1. Pricing: 1 month ~ $5.89Payment Methods: Bitcoin, Bitcoin Cash, Monero, Bank Wire, Credit Card, PayPal, Swish, Eps Transfer, Bancontact, iDEAL, Wero, Przelewy24

Proton VPN (1) FREE tier

  1. Pricing: 1 month ~ $9.99 Payment Methods: Credit Card, PayPal, Google Pay

Riseup VPN FREE

Mysterium Dark (1) Pay-As-You-Go, Residental servers.

  1. Pricing: $3.99 = 200 GiB, $5.49 = 300 GiB, $9.49 = 567 GiB Payment Methods: Crypto, Credit Card

Cloudflare WARP (1.1.1.1) FREE

docs.title: Piracy
docs.text:
Modified tools or software that removes licenses that are usually paid.

Where are the links?

Links are encoded in Base64, they look like this! "aHR0cHM6Ly90b2thdWEubG9s". You must use a tool like base64decode.org in order to decode the contents.

Massgrave aHR0cHM6Ly9tYXNzZ3JhdmUuZGV2 An open-source Windows and Office activator featuring HWID, Ohook, TSforge, and Online KMS activation methods, along with advanced troubleshooting.

m0nkrus aHR0cHM6Ly93MTgubW9ua3J1cy53cw== Adobe software

MalwareWatch aHR0cHM6Ly9kbC5tYWx3YXJld2F0Y2gub3JnL3NvZnR3YXJlL3VzZWZ1bC9tZWRpYS92ZWdhcw== Sony VEGAS

DODI Repacks aHR0cHM6Ly9kb2RpLXJlcGFja3Muc2l0ZQ== Video Game Repacks

FitGirl Repacks aHR0cHM6Ly9maXRnaXJsLXJlcGFja3Muc2l0ZQ== Video Game Repacks

docs.title: Scripts
docs.text:
a collection of useful scripts for various tasks.

Chris Titus Tech's Windows Utility Install Programs, Tweaks, Fixes, and Updates.

Clone entire GitHub Profile / Organization 

gh repo list ORGNAMEHERE --limit 4000 | while read -r repo _; do
  gh repo clone "$repo" "$repo"
done

Update Existing Repositories 

gh repo list myorgname --limit 1000 | while read -r repo _; do
  gh repo clone "$repo" "$repo" -- -q 2>/dev/null || (
    cd "$repo"
    git checkout -q main 2>/dev/null || true
    git checkout -q master 2>/dev/null || true
    git pull -q
  )
done

WinMasterBlocker Block All Adobe connections via Firewall.
